banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock filer: an individual owner of an ordinary (non-Weekend/Off-Peak, non-heavy) private car renewing road tax for 6 months online by credit card. The vehicle registration number is fabricated test data, not a real vehicle record.

collectedValues.label: Vehicle Registration Number
collectedValues.sourceRef: Road Tax — 'You can check how much road tax to pay by entering your Vehicle Registration Number'

collectedValues.label: Is the vehicle a Weekend Car, Off-Peak Car, or Revised Off-Peak Car?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Road Tax — Weekend/Off-Peak/Revised Off-Peak Car prerequisites

collectedValues.label: Is the vehicle a heavy vehicle?
Renewal period
collectedValues.sourceRef: Road Tax — 'You can renew road tax for 6 or 12 months.'

collectedValues.label: Vehicle is insured for the full renewal period
Is a periodic vehicle inspection currently due?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Road Tax — 'If your vehicle is due for periodic inspection, you will receive an inspection notice about 3 months before your road tax expires.'

collectedValues.label: No outstanding fines or warrants from LTA, HDB, URA, or Traffic Police
How do you want to renew your road tax?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Road Tax — 'There are 4 different ways to renew your road tax: Online / AXS services / GIRO / Road Tax Collection Centres'

collectedValues.label: Online payment instrument
collectedValues.sourceRef: Road Tax — 'A valid credit or debit card (VISA or MasterCard only) or an Internet Banking account with DBS/POSB, OCBC/Plus!, Standard Chartered Bank or UOB (eNETS Debit).'

fieldsNotApplicable.reason: vehicleInspectionDue is false, so this requiredWhen field does not apply for this mock filer.
isWeekendOffPeakOrRevisedOffPeakCar is false, so this requiredWhen field does not apply.
isHeavyVehicle is false, so this requiredWhen field does not apply.
paymentMethod is online, not axs, so this requiredWhen field does not apply.
paymentMethod is online, not collection_centre, so this requiredWhen document does not apply.
paymentMethod is online (not collection_centre) and vehicleInspectionDue is false, so this requiredWhen document does not apply either way.

attestation: documents[].roadTaxPayment — a mock-scenario note only; no payment was made or attempted, since this schema does not submit the renewal and does not encode a fixed fee amount.
safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (sg/lta/road-tax-renewal). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to LTA or any government system, and the vehicle registration number above is a fabricated example, not a real record — LTA's OneMotoring 'Renew Road Tax' digital service requires a genuine Singpass login and has no public test/sandbox mode, so this schema's author did not attempt to exercise the live wizard end to end (see VERIFICATION.md). A human (the registered owner) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize payment through LTA's own channel (https://onemotoring.lta.gov.sg/) before this renewal is submitted. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
